text.title: Performance Budget Design Output Contract
text.summary: Pins the shape of a valid Performance Budget Design output. Subagent must satisfy this before returning to the caller.

required.field: [{route, p50, p95, p99, lcp, fid, cls}]

forbidden.pattern: global budget with no per-route distinction

allowed-transformations.transformation: Trim narrative fields to ≤500 chars preserving named entities + numeric claims.
Promote a 'no decision yet' state to status='pending' rather than fabricating a decision.

list.item: baseline_metrics populated with a typed value
budgets populated with a typed value
ci_gate_config populated with a typed value
review_cadence populated with a typed value
owner populated with a typed value
No forbidden pattern matches the output
